cc.cdrUnsupported: CorelDRAW .cdr tsari ne na mallaka na binary ba tare da wani mai karanta abin dogaro a cikin birawsa ba. A cikin CorelDRAW zabi File → Export → DXF (ko SVG/EPS) ka shigar da shi — karmyogi na cikakken goyon bayan DXF, har da splines & ellipses.
cc.closedTip: Madauki a rufe — ana bukata don Profile / Pocket
cc.decimalsTip: Yawan wuraren lambobi a cikin tsarin da aka fitar

motion.confirm.clearOffsets:
Share dukkan daidaitar tsarin aiki (G54–G59, G28/G30, G92)?

Ana ajiye saitunan na'ura; sai daidaitar sifirinka ne kawai aka share.
motion.confirm.resetSettings:
Mayar da na'ura zuwa tsayayyen tsarinta na asali mai kyau?

Wannan yana gudanar da $RST=$ sannan ya rubuta bayanin asali na karmyogi (steps/mm 1600, max rate 1000, accel 30, max travel 200, da sauransu) — yi amfani da shi don dawo da mai sarrafawa da ya lalace ko aka saita ba daidai ba.
motion.confirm.wipeAll:
CIKAKKEN GOGE EEPROM: sake saita DUKA saituna DA daidaitar tsari zuwa na asali?

Wannan shine zaɓin ƙarshe — komai yana komawa zuwa na masana'anta.

probe.adv.caution: Hankali: iyakoki masu wuya ($21) suna buƙatar an tara sauyawar iyaka ta jiki. Yawancin sauyawa na al'ada ne rufaffu — idan sauyawa ya nuna an kunna yayin da yake a buɗe a fitilun da ke sama, kunna juya pins na iyaka ($5). Iyakoki masu laushi ($20) suna aiki ne kawai bayan nasarar zagayen komawa gida.
probe.adv.hardLimitsDesc: tsaya a kan kunnawar sauyawar iyaka (na buƙatar an tara sauyawa)
probe.adv.limitInvertDesc: juya shigar iyaka — saita KUNNE don sauyawar NC (rufaffu na al'ada)
probe.adv.softLimitsDesc: ƙi motsi da ya wuce matsakaicin tafiya na $130–$132 (na buƙatar komawa gida)
probe.adv.syncTip: $$ — sake karanta saituna domin maɓallai su nuna na'ura
probe.adv.title: Na ci gaba: iyakoki & komawa gida

probe.intro: Nemo Z=0 da probe na taɓawa, kuma duba sauyawar iyaka / probe kai tsaye. Saitunan iyaka & komawa gida na GRBL na ci gaba an ɓoye su a ƙasa.
probe.switch.connectNote: Haɗa zuwa na'urar GRBL don ganin matsayin pin kai tsaye.
probe.switch.hint: Danna sauyawa da hannu — yana haskakawa anan.
probe.switch.title: Gano sauyawa kai tsaye
probe.z.codeAria: G-code da waɗannan maɓallai ke aikawa
probe.z.lastProbeTip: $# — fitar da tsarin daidaitawa haɗe da PRB (sakamakon probe na ƙarshe) zuwa na'ura mai kwakwalwa
probe.z.lastSent: An aika probe na ƙarshe — duba na'ura mai kwakwalwa / "Nuna probe na ƙarshe".
probe.z.maxDistSub: daina idan babu taɓawa cikin wannan tazara
probe.z.noAlarmTip: G38.3 Z- F — probe zuwa ga aikin, amma KADA ka yi ƙararrawa idan babu taɓawa.
probe.z.probeTip: G38.2 Z- F — saukar da kayan aiki har sai ya taɓa farantin. Yana ƙararrawa idan babu taɓawa cikin matsakaicin tazara.
probe.z.safety1: yana saukar da kayan aiki — danƙa clip ɗin probe zuwa kayan aiki kuma sa farantin ya huta a kan aikin tukuna. 1) Sanya farantin. 2)
probe.z.safety2: yana tsayawa a kan taɓawa (ya nuna a matsayin
probe.z.safety5: domin Z=0 ya zauna a saman farantin.
probe.z.setZeroTip: G10 L20 P0 Z<thickness> — saita aikin Z=0 a saman farantin. Gudanar bayan nasarar probe.
probe.z.speedSub: yadda za a saukar da sauri zuwa ga aikin
probe.z.title: Probe na Z

prog.etaRemaining: Lokacin da aka kiyasta ya rage
prog.etaTotal: Lokacin gudanarwa gaba ɗaya da aka kiyasta

sig.info.loaded: An loda "{name}" ({w}×{h}px). Daidaita kofa da girma a ƙasa.
sig.info.noInk: Ba a gano tawada ba — gwada daidaita kofa ko juya Juyawa.
sig.info.notImage: Da fatan za a zaɓi fayil ɗin hoto.
sig.info.start: Loda hoton sa hannu don farawa.
sig.intro.post: (bayanin gefen kowane bugu), ba layin tsakiya ba.
sig.intro.pre: Loda hoton sa hannu — ana bibiyar shi zuwa bayanan gefe na vector kai tsaye, sannan a aika a matsayin G-code na mai zane na alƙalami. Mafi kyau da sa hannu mai tsabta, mai bambanci a kan fari. Wannan yana bibiyar tawada
sig.preview.aria: Nunin sa hannu da aka bibiya
sig.preview.title: Nunin bibiya
sig.preview.upload: Loda hoto don ganin bibiya kai tsaye anan.
sig.raw.placeholder: G-code da aka ƙirƙira zai bayyana anan.

sig.send.live: Nunin kai tsaye ne; haɗa na'ura don aikawa.
sig.send.title.on: Yi gudana wannan shirin zuwa na'ura
solder.defaults.title: Na asali na sabon maki
solder.feeder.title: 2 · Feeder & motsi
solder.intro.bold: fitar spindle yana sarrafa feeder na waya na walƙi
solder.intro.lead: Yana walƙa jerin maki ɗaya bayan ɗaya. Na'ura ta
solder.intro.rest: (M3 yana gudanar da shi, M5 yana tsayar da shi). Ƙara maki ko rikodin matsayi, daidaita feeder, sannan aika.
solder.points.hint: Ana cika sabbin maki daga na asali a ƙasa. Danna layi don zaɓarsa (sannan "Rikodin matsayi" yana cika X/Y nasa).

writing.intro: Rubuta rubutu → yana nunawa kai tsaye a cikin Visualizer → danna Aika ▶. An nuna shi a matsayin font na vector na bugu ɗaya a cikin G-code na mai zane na alƙalami (Z = ɗagar / saukar alƙalami).
writing.letterSpacing.tip: Ƙarin gibi da aka ƙara bayan kowane baki, a millimita.
writing.lineSpacing.tip: Tazara tsakanin layukan tushe a matsayin ninkin tsayin baki.
writing.missingGlyphs: Glyph(s) da suka ɓace: {glyphs} — an nuna su a matsayin gibi mara komai.
writing.originX.tip: Matsar dukkan toshen rubutu tare da X, a millimita.
writing.originY.tip: Matsar dukkan toshen rubutu tare da Y, a millimita.
